pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates demographic record with demographic_no=10001
setup_task.sh creates demographic record with demographic_no=10002
setup_task.sh creates both records with date_of_birth='1965-05-20'
setup_task.sh creates both records with last_name='Smith'
Official Oscar EMR documentation and GitHub repo (https://github.com/open-osp/open-osp) confirm standard demo username
Official Oscar EMR documentation and GitHub repo specify default demo password as 'mac2002', not 'oscar'
Official Oscar EMR documentation and GitHub repo confirm standard PIN

privileged_info_summary: The task involves merging two synthetic patient records in Oscar EMR (a real open-source EMR system from McMaster University). Primary record 10001 contains 'Robert James Smith' (DOB 1965-05-20, phone 416-555-0123), and duplicate record 10002 contains 'Rob J Smith' (DOB 1965-05-20, phone 416-555-0124) with a penicillin allergy. The default login credentials specified are oscardoc / PIN 1117 (verified), but the password is incorrectly listed as 'oscar' when the official Oscar EMR default demo password is 'mac2002'. All patient data is synthetic, created by setup scripts for this task.
